title: Chaos Engineering: Testing System Resilience
author: Sam Wilson
Site Reliability Engineer
description: Implement controlled failure injection with Chaos Mesh—but chaos in production is risky
content:
Chaos engineering proactively tests system resilience by injecting failures. This guide implements controlled chaos experiments.

**⚠️ WARNING**: Only run chaos experiments in controlled environments with proper safeguards.

## Related Chronicles**: [The Mesh Meltdown (2036)](/docs/articles/mesh-meltdown-2036)
